debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝¹¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹⁰ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝⁹ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E
H : Type u_2
inst✝⁸ : TopologicalSpace H
I : ModelWithCorners ℝ E H
M : Type u_3
inst✝⁷ : TopologicalSpace M
inst✝⁶ : ChartedSpace H M
m : IsManifold I (↑⊤) M
hI : I.Boundaryless
E' : Type u_4

inst✝⁴ : NormedSpace ℝ E'
inst✝³ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E'
H' : Type u_5
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace H'
I' : ModelWithCorners ℝ E' H'
N : Type u_6
inst✝¹ : TopologicalSpace N
inst✝ : ChartedSpace H' N
m' : IsManifold I' (↑⊤) N
f : M → N
s : Set M
hs : IsOpen s
x✝¹ : DiffeologicalSpace M := @IsManifold.toDiffeology E inst✝¹¹ inst✝¹⁰ H inst✝⁸ I M inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ m
x✝ : DiffeologicalSpace N := @IsManifold.toDiffeology E' inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ H' inst✝² I' N inst✝¹ inst✝ m'
hf : DSmooth (s.restrict f)
x : M
hxs : x ∈ s
⊢ ContMDiffWithinAt I I' (↑⊤) f s x

failed_attempts:
have h₂ : IsOpen (chartAt H x).source := (chartAt H x).open_source
  have h₃ : x ∈ (chartAt H x).source := mem_chart_source H x
  have h₄ : (chartAt H x).source ⊆ s := hs.mem_nhds hxs |>.mp (nhdsWithin_le_nhds h₂ h₃)
  have h₅ : ContMDiffOn I I' ∞ f ((chartAt H x).source) :=
    by
    apply contMDiffOn_of_contMDiffWithinAt
    intro y hy
    have h₆ : y ∈ s := h₄ hy
    have h₇ : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f s y := by
      apply ContMDiffWithinAt.congr_set h₄ hy
      have h₈ : DSmooth (s.restrict f) := hf
      have h₉ : IsPlot (chartAt H y ∘ (chartAt H x).symm) :=
        (contMDiff_chart_symm (x := x)).comp_contMDiff (contMDiff_chart (x := y)) (by simp)
      have h₁₀ : IsPlot (s.restrict f ∘ (chartAt H y ∘ (chartAt H x).symm)) := h₈ _ h₉
      rw [restrict_eq] at h₁₀
      exact contMDiffWithinAt_of_contMDiffOn h₁₀
    exact h₇
  exact (contMDiffOn_congr_set h₄.symm).mpr h₅

rw [contMDiffWithinAt_iff]
    intro n p hp hx
    have hplot : IsPlot (p ∘ (chartAt H x).symm) := by
      rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff]
      exact (contMDiff_symm.mpr hI).comp_contMDiff hp (by simp)
    have hsmooth : ContMDiff (𝓡 n) I' ∞ ((s.restrict f) ∘ (p ∘ (chartAt H x).symm)) :=
      hf n (p ∘ (chartAt H x).symm) hplot
    rw [restrict_eq, Function.comp_assoc] at hsmooth
    exact hsmooth.contMDiffWithinAt
  exact this

apply contMDiffWithinAt_of_contDiffWithinAt
    · exact hI
    · intro n p hp hx
      have : IsPlot (s.restrict f ∘ p) := hf n p hp
      rw [restrict_eq, Function.comp_assoc] at this
      simp only [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at this
      exact this.contMDiffWithinAt (by simp [hx])
  exact this

have := hf (chartAt H x).source (chartAt H x).toFun

    have := this.contMDiffWithinAt
    rwa [restrict_eq, Function.comp_assoc, chartAt_source, hs.mem_nhds hxs,
      contMDiffWithinAt_univ_of_mem_nhds hs hxs] at this
  exact this

apply contMDiffWithinAt_of_contMDiffAt

    · apply contMDiffAt_of_contMDiffOn_univ
      intro n p hp
      have : DSmooth (s.restrict f) := hf
      rw [restrict_eq] at this
      specialize this n p hp
      rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at hp
      exact this.contMDiffAt
  exact this

rw [contMDiffWithinAt_iff]
    intro n p hp hx
    have hpx : p x ∈ s := hxs
    have hplot : IsPlot (s.restrict f ∘ p) := hf n p hp
    rw [restrict_eq, Function.comp_assoc] at hplot

exact this.congr_of_eventuallyEq (by aesop)

rw [contMDiffWithinAt_iff]

    have : IsPlot (chartAt H' (f x) ∘ f ∘ (chartAt H x).symm) :=

exact this.congr_of_eventuallyEq (by simp [restrict_eq])
exact this.contMDiffWithinAt hs.mem_nhds hxs

apply contMDiffWithinAt_of_contDiffWithinAt

      have h2 : IsPlot (s.restrict f ∘ p) := hf n p h1

intro n p hp
    rw [restrict_eq] at hf
    exact (hf n p hp).contMDiffOn
  have hchart : ∀ x ∈ s, ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f s x := by
    intro x hx
    have hchart := chartAt H x
    have hchart_open := hchart.open_source
    have hx_in_chart := mem_chart_source H x
    have hcomp := contMDiffWithinAt_congr_of_eventuallyEq (hchart.symm.contMDiffAt hx_in_chart)
      (by simp [hchart.left_inv, hchart.right_inv])
    have hplot_chart := hplot _ hchart.symm.contMDiff
    have hpreimage := hchart_open.isOpenMap_subtype_val _ hs
    have htarget := hchart.target_mem_nhds
    have hsmooth := contMDiffOn_univ.1 hplot_chart
    exact (contMDiffWithinAt_chart_symm_iff.2 hsmooth) hx
  exact hchart x hxs
exact this.contMDiffWithinAt

(by rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff]; exact contMDiff_chart)
  simp_rw [restrict_eq, Function.comp_assoc] at this
  exact (contMDiffWithinAt_congr hs.mem_nhds hxs).mpr
    ((contMDiffOn_chart_symm _).comp_contMDiffWithinAt this hxs)
exact this

hf _ (chartAt H' (f x)).symm (isPlot_chart_symm.mpr (by apply_instance))
  rw [restrict_eq, Function.comp_assoc] at hplot
  exact contMDiffWithinAt_of_contMDiffAt hs hxs
    (contMDiffAt_iff_contMDiffAt_comp_chart_symm.1
      (contMDiffAt_of_contMDiff hplot))

have h := hf (chartAt H x).source (chartAt H x).symm
    have h₁ : IsPlot (chartAt H x).symm := by
      rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff]
      exact (contMDiff_symm (chart_mem_atlas _)).of_le le_top
    have h₂ : (chartAt H x).symm ⁻¹' s ∈ 𝓝 (chartAt H x x) := by
      apply isOpen.preimage
      · exact hs
      · exact (chartAt H x).continuous
    have h₃ := h h₁
    rw [restrict_eq, Function.comp_assoc] at h₃
    exact contMDiffWithinAt_congr_set h₂ (by simp [hs]) |>.mpr
      ((contMDiffOn_chart_symm (x := x)).comp_contMDiff h₃ fun y ↦ (chartAt H x).symm y ∈ s)
  exact this
exact h
exact this

apply contMDiffWithinAt_of_contMDiffOn
    · exact hs
    · intro u hu x' hx'u
      have : IsPlot (u.restrict (s.restrict f ∘ coe)) := by
        apply hf
        apply isPlot_restrict
        apply isPlot_of_contMDiff
        exact contMDiff_id
      rw [restrict_eq, Function.comp_assoc] at this
      exact this.contMDiffWithinAt
  exact this
exact this

apply contMDiffWithinAt_of_contDiffWithinAt
    · exact hI
    · intro n p hp hx
      have : IsPlot (s.restrict f ∘ p) := hf n p hp
      rw [restrict_eq, Function.comp_assoc] at this
      rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at this
      exact this.contMDiffWithinAt (mem_univ _)
  exact this
